Identity.Tooltip: Professional slinger delivering accurate, high-impact missile fire. (+15% damage, +6 range and 20% more accurate but 2 tenths of a second slower repeat time and +25% train time) Strengths: Superior range and armor penetration with lead shot. Weaknesses: Limited effectiveness once engaged in melee.
Identity.History: Rhodian slingers were renowned in the ancient world for their exceptional skill and effectiveness in using the sling as a projectile weapon
